nasb.text: There is swearing, deception, murder, stealing and adultery. They employ violence, so that bloodshed follows bloodshed.

esv.text: there is swearing, lying, murder, stealing, and committing adultery; they break all bounds, and bloodshed follows bloodshed.

cnv.text: 只有起假誓、撒謊、殘殺、偷盜、姦淫、行強暴，以至流人血事件相繼而來。

ccb.text: 他们咒诅、撒谎、凶杀、偷窃、通奸， 为所欲为，血案累累。
